metadata.title: Quiniela FUTVE — Predict the Liga FUTVE
metadata.description: Join private pools, predict each matchday and climb the rankings. Free and in minutes.

hero.title: Predict the <grad>Liga FUTVE</grad> and compete with <accent>your friends</accent>
hero.sub: Join private pools, predict each matchday and climb the rankings. Free and in minutes.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.sub: Three steps from the invitation to the matchday ranking.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create a private pool or join your friends' pool with an invitation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Forecast the results of Liga FUTVE matches before they kick off.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Nail results, earn points and compete in your pool and global rankings.

preview.title: See it from the inside
preview.sub: Simple predictions each matchday and a leaderboard that keeps the competition alive among friends.

cta.title: Ready to <grad>play?</grad>
cta.sub: Create your free account and set up your first pool in minutes.

footer.tagline: Football pools for the Liga FUTVE.
